name: Svaadh Kitchen
tagline: Wholesome homemade vegetarian meals, straight from our kitchen to your plate.

about.summary: Svaadh Kitchen is a home-based vegetarian cloud kitchen in Hadapsar, Pune, serving fresh and wholesome homemade meals for over 2.5 years.
about.description: We specialize in homemade vegetarian food, offering breakfast, lunch, and dinner with a changing daily sabji menu. We serve Bhosale Garden (free delivery), Magarpatta, Amanora Township, and DP Road areas. Our meals are cooked fresh daily using quality ingredients and traditional recipes.

delivery.delivery_charge: ₹10 per meal for Magarpatta / Amanora / DP Road, only if that meal's subtotal is below ₹100. Free for Bhosale Garden always.
delivery.per_meal_address: Each meal can go to a different address — breakfast at home, lunch at office, dinner back home.

menu.note: Today's sabji (dry and curry) changes daily and is shown in the order form. Breakfast items also rotate daily.
menu.breakfast: Rotating daily menu — items like Kanda Poha, Aloo Paratha, Paneer Paratha with Curd. Prices vary per item. Check the order form for today's breakfast options.

discounts.tier1: 5% off when the day's total is ₹300 or more
discounts.tier2: 7.5% off when the day's total is ₹450 or more
discounts.note: Discounts are applied automatically per day's total when you place an order online.

wallet.name: Svaadh Wallet
wallet.recharge: Min ₹100 via UPI. Pay to the provided VPA/QR, then click 'I have completed the payment' to alert Admin for verification (usually takes 1-2 hours).
wallet.benefit: Enables 1-tap ordering without paying every time. Balance is visible at the top-right of the order page from Step 2 onwards.
wallet.ten_day_adjust: On the 10th, 20th, and end of month, any 10-day pending bill is automatically adjusted from your wallet balance.

payment.ten_day_cycle: Instead of paying per order, your amount accumulates over 10 days (1st–10th, 11th–20th, 21st–end of month). You settle once at the end of the period. Choose this under Payment Preference in the order form.

ordering.platform: Website order form / PWA Mobile App
ordering.mobile_app: You can install our website as a mobile app (PWA) on your phone. Click 'Install App' on the home page or order page for a home-screen icon and fast access.
ordering.process: Open the order form → enter phone number → fill delivery address → pick dates on calendar → choose meals → review bill → pay via Wallet, UPI, or COD.
ordering.live_tracking: Once an order is marked 'Out for Delivery' by our driver, you'll see a '🚗 Out for Delivery' badge in your 'View/Edit upcoming orders' dashboard.
ordering.advance_ordering: You can select multiple dates on the calendar to order for the whole week in one go.
ordering.edit_cancel: You can edit or cancel any order before the cutoff time using 'View/Edit existing orders' on the order form home screen.
ordering.no_login: No login needed — your phone number is your identity. Your address and details are saved for the next order.

vision: To make homemade vegetarian meals easily accessible and affordable for everyone, while maintaining taste, quality, and consistency.
